subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the presence of One mighty and wise. There is no doubt therein that it hath verily been revealed in truth from the presence of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من لدن عزیز حکیم لا ریب فیه انه نزل بالحق من لدی الله
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
